label: Audit records
interpretation: Most-cited KNIME-matching article records selected from OpenAlex

label: Records with local PDF
interpretation: Source PDF recorded in the compact audit report

label: Uses KNIME
interpretation: KNIME used as a workflow, tool, interface, or implementation context

label: Workflow or nodes described in text
interpretation: Named workflow steps, nodes, modules, or components recorded

label: Workflow screenshots or figures
interpretation: Workflow shown visually in article or supplement

label: Reports downloadable workflows
interpretation: Executable workflow files provided or linked

label: Reports extension/plugin dependencies
interpretation: KNIME extension or node-library dependency reported

label: Reports extension installation source
interpretation: Update site, project URL, or installation source reported

label: Provides code or scripts
interpretation: Code repository, scripts, or software code reported

label: Reports input-data availability
interpretation: Data availability stated, with or without direct URL

label: Direct input-data resource
interpretation: Direct data URL or resource pointer recorded
